name: DDSP solo_flute2 retest

direct_voc_a1_ge_0.55.note: solo_flute2_ckpt is not on this host; no direct HTTP URL on Magenta GCS resolves to the checkpoint (404 on all tested paths); gcloud / gsutil not installed in env

three_fixes_shipped.note: crossfade 200ms overlap-add, loudness-norm bypass, solo_flute2 checkpoint path

discard_rationale: Magenta's DDSP solo_flute checkpoint is hosted on GCS but no direct HTTPS URL resolves (tested storage.googleapis.com/magentadata/... 404). Without gcloud/gsutil + Magenta GCS auth, the checkpoint cannot be downloaded into this environment. The three architectural fixes (crossfade, loudness-norm bypass, solo_flute2 checkpoint path) are shipped; the measurement cannot run without the weights. v3 item 3 already showed solo_violin gave Voc A1 = 0.14 (well below 0.55), and the only theoretical basis for solo_flute2 clearing 0.55 is 'flute is less vibrato-sensitive' — without empirical confirmation, the strict criterion cannot be claimed met.
